_comment: Validate/dry-run-only example. Reproduce with: pnpm research:plan:dry-run -- examples/research-plans/quickstart-v2-human-gate-parallel.json --pretty. research:plan:run intentionally fails closed for research-plan.v2 until live execution semantics are separately designed.

steps.instruction: Read src/contracts/runtime-settings.ts and summarize the runtime settings fields that affect provider execution. End with: runtime-settings-v2-OK

steps.question: Confirm that the operator wants the dry-run graph to continue to the bounded parallel reader group.

subTasks.instruction: Read src/contracts/capability-envelope.ts and summarize the metadata-only envelope fields. End with: capability-envelope-v2-OK
Read src/contracts/context-budget-snapshot.ts and summarize token/context provenance fields. End with: context-budget-v2-OK
